commit_scope: Fix Hostinger deploy retry status capture so failed SSH/SCP attempts keep their real nonzero exit code.

commands: bash -lc 'set -e; retry_remote() { local attempt=1; local max_attempts=1; while :; do if "$@"; then return 0; else rc=$?; fi; if [ "$attempt" -ge "$max_attempts" ]; then return "$rc"; fi; attempt=$((attempt + 1)); done; }; set +e; retry_remote bash -c "exit 7"; observed=$?; set -e; test "$observed" -eq 7'

bash -lc 'set -e; retry_remote() { local attempt=1; local max_attempts=1; while :; do if "$@"; then return 0; else rc=$?; fi; if [ "$attempt" -ge "$max_attempts" ]; then return "$rc"; fi; attempt=$((attempt + 1)); done; }; retry_remote bash -c "exit 0"'
local_validation.notes: The deploy failure for PR #2381 showed remote sync failures reported with rc=0. The local reproduction proves the patched retry wrapper preserves nonzero command status and still accepts success.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

deploy_validation.notes: Pending merge and Hostinger workflow rerun.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Hostinger deploy retries no longer collapse failed SSH/SCP command status to rc=0, making the deploy block diagnosable and preventing false zero-status failure loops.
test_flows: Hostinger Auto Deploy should roll forward after this workflow fix is merged.

phase_gate.reason: This is a deploy pipeline fix needed to embody the BML control primitive slice in production. Full BML thesis parity remains open.

evidence_refs: .github/workflows/hostinger-auto-deploy.yml captures retry_remote rc inside the else branch of the tested remote command.
The local shell reproduction proves a failed command returns 7 and a successful command returns 0.
